title: Even Cursed!
body: # Even Cursed! (1.16.5 & 1.18.2) ## Info Added more **Cursed** Enchantments! ### List of all added enchantments: - **Curse of Blindness**[Helmet]: Make you **blind**. - **Curse of Weakness**[All wearable]: Make you become **weaker**. - **Curse of Poison**[All wearable]: When you get hit, you get **poison until you have half a heart**. - **Curse of Explosion**[All wearable]: When you get hit, you **explode**. - **Curse of Hunger**[All wearable]: Make you **hungry all the time**. **More coming soon!** ## Support me!
